ast.name: error
ast.source: Vim clipboard sync failed:
ast.target: Vim 剪贴板同步失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Vim clipboard read failed: Electron clipboard unavailable.
ast.target: Vim 剪贴板读取失败：Electron 剪贴板不可用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Vim clipboard sync failed: clipboard API unavailable.
ast.target: Vim 剪贴板同步失败：剪贴板 API 不可用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Vim clipboard sync failed: register controller unavailable.
ast.target: Vim 剪贴板同步失败：寄存器控制器不可用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: better-vim cannot initialize! Vim is not avalible (vim mode probably disabled).
ast.target: better-vim 无法初始化！Vim 不可用（vim 模式可能已禁用）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: inserts a new bullet point of doing vims `o` or `O` on a bullet list or numbered list
ast.target: 在项目符号列表或编号列表上执行 vim 的 `o` 或 `O` 命令时插入一个新的项目符号点

ast.name: description
ast.source: highlight yanks with a visual indicator
ast.target: 用视觉指示器高亮显示复制的文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: How long the yank highlight is fully displayed before fading starts
ast.target: 复制文本高亮完全显示后开始淡出的时间长度

ast.name: description
ast.source: Duration of the fade-out animation after the highlight duration
ast.target: 高亮持续时间后淡出动画的持续时间

ast.name: description
ast.source: use visual-line motions (j/k/0/$/_/A/I/V) on wrapped lines
ast.target: 在换行行上使用可视行移动命令 (j/k/0/$/_/A/I/V)

ast.name: description
ast.source: j and k go up and down one visual line
ast.target: j 和 k 上下移动一个可视行

ast.name: description
ast.source: 0 and $ jump to start and end of visual line
ast.target: 0 和 $ 跳转到可视行的开头和结尾

ast.name: description
ast.source: _ goes to the first non whitespace character of the visual line
ast.target: _ 移动到可视行的第一个非空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: I and A go to insert mode but in the visual line
ast.target: I 和 A 进入插入模式，但作用于可视行

ast.name: description
ast.source: V selects only the visual line not the entire paragraph
ast.target: V 仅选择可视行，而非整个段落

ast.name: name
ast.source: List new bullet point
ast.target: 列表新项目符号

ast.name: name
ast.source: Yank to clipboard
ast.target: 复制到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.source: Paste from clipboard
ast.target: 从剪贴板粘贴

ast.name: name
ast.source: Highlight yanks
ast.target: 高亮复制操作

ast.name: name
ast.source: Highlight duration (ms)
ast.target: 高亮持续时间 (毫秒)

ast.name: name
ast.source: Fade duration (ms)
ast.target: 淡出持续时间 (毫秒)

ast.name: name
ast.source: Visual line navigation
ast.target: 可视行导航

ast.name: name
ast.source: j, k
ast.target: j, k

ast.name: name
ast.source: I, A
